name: kubernetes-ml
description: Kubernetes for ML workloads: Kubeflow, KServe, Ray, PyTorch Operator, Volcano, Kueue. Covers training, serving, pipelines, scheduling, and GPU resource management.
author: anwar

commands.name: k8s:kubeflow
commands.prompt:
Deploy Kubeflow with:
- Components: Pipelines, Katib (HPO), KServe (serving), Training Operator, Notebooks
- Installation: manifests, kustomize, kubeflow-gke, AWS, Azure
- Pipelines: SDK v2, DSL, components, caching, parameters
- Katib: hyperparameter tuning, NAS, algorithms (TPE, CMA-ES, Grid)
- KServe: InferenceService, predictor, explainer, transformer
- Training Operator: PyTorchJob, TensorFlowJob, MPIJob, RayJob
- Notebooks: JupyterLab, VS Code, RStudio, custom images
- Metadata: MLMD, artifact tracking, lineage
- Multi-user: Istio, Dex, RBAC, namespaces
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, dashboards
- Upgrade: version migration, backup/restore

commands.name: k8s:kserve
commands.prompt:
Deploy KServe with:
- InferenceService: predictor, transformer, explainer
- Runtimes: SKLearn, XGBoost, LightGBM, PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX, Triton, TensorRT-LLM, vLLM
- Storage: PVC, S3, GCS, URI
- Autoscaling: KPA (Knative Pod Autoscaler), HPA, custom metrics
- Canary: traffic split, progressive delivery, Flagger
- ModelMesh: multi-model serving, model management
- Auth: OIDC, API keys, Knative auth
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, OpenTelemetry
- Logging: structured, request/response
- Batching: batch predictor, queue, timeout

commands.name: k8s:ray
commands.prompt:
Deploy Ray with:
- Operator: KubeRay operator, custom resources
- Cluster: RayCluster, RayJob, RayService
- Autoscaling: head/worker groups, min/max replicas
- Resources: GPU, CPU, memory, custom resources
- Scheduling: gang scheduling, topology aware, priority
- Runtime: Ray Docker images, custom environments
- Jobs: RayJob, submission, monitoring, logs
- Serve: Ray Serve, deployments, ingress, autoscaling
- Data: Ray Data, Datasets, streaming
- Tune: Ray Tune, HPO, schedulers, search algorithms
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, Ray Dashboard
- Integration: MLflow, WandB, Kubeflow, Airflow

commands.name: k8s:pytorch-operator
commands.prompt:
Deploy PyTorch Operator with:
- PyTorchJob: distributed training spec
- Backends: gloo, nccl, mpi, ccl
- Elastic: min/max replicas, rdzv backend (etcd, consul)
- Resources: GPU, CPU, memory per replica
- Volumes: PVC, emptyDir, hostPath, configMap
- Checkpointing: volume, S3, GCS
- Monitoring: metrics, events, logs
- Cleanup: TTL, success/failure policy
- Integration: Kubeflow, MLflow, WandB
- Multi-node: worker groups, master/worker

commands.name: k8s:scheduling
commands.prompt:
Configure GPU scheduling with:
- Device plugins: NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, Habana
- NVIDIA: MIG, time-slicing, mig-partition, gpu-feature-discovery
- Scheduler: default, volcano, kueue, coscheduling
- Volcano: gang scheduling, queue, priority, preemption
- Kueue: cluster queue, local queue, borrowing, admission
- Topology: node affinity, pod affinity, spread constraints
- Resource quotas: namespace, priority class
- Bin packing: requestedToCapacityRatio, leastRequested
- GPU sharing: MIG, time-slicing, vGPU
- Monitoring: DCGM exporter, GPU metrics, utilization

commands.name: k8s:mlops-platform
commands.prompt:
Build MLOps platform with:
- Core: Kubeflow, KServe, Ray, MLflow, ArgoCD
- Pipelines: Kubeflow Pipelines, Argo Workflows, Dagster
- Feature Store: Feast (online/offline), Tecton
- Experiment Tracking: MLflow, WandB, Neptune
- Model Registry: MLflow, Kubeflow Metadata
- Serving: KServe, vLLM, Triton, BentoML
- Monitoring: Prometheus, Grafana, Evidently, WhyLabs
- Drift Detection: Evidently, custom
- CI/CD: ArgoCD, Flux, Tekton, GitHub Actions
- GitOps: app-of-apps, multi-cluster, environments
- Security: Kyverno, OPA Gatekeeper, Istio mTLS
- Cost: Kubecost, Karpenter, spot instances
- Developer Experience: Backstage, internal developer portal

agents.name: kubernetes-ml-engineer
agents.prompt: You are a Kubernetes ML engineer. Expert in: Kubeflow, KServe, Ray, PyTorch Operator, Volcano, Kueue, Karpenter. Build production ML platforms on Kubernetes with: GPU scheduling, distributed training, model serving, pipelines, monitoring, GitOps, cost optimization. Write manifests, operators, and automation with Helm, Kustomize, and controllers.
